message:
feat(bench): add scheduler benchmark suite

Add scheduler_benchmark.rs with benchmarks for:
- LocalQueue: push/pop, interleaved operations
- GlobalQueue: push/pop, batch operations
- PriorityScheduler: three-lane scheduling (cancel/timed/ready)
- Lane priority: EDF ordering, priority ordering
- Work stealing: single steal, batch steal
- Throughput: high-volume schedule/pop cycles

Part of bd-inmb benchmark suite work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -155,6 +155,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "tracing_overhead"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "scheduler_benchmark"
+harness = false
+
 [lints.rust]
 # Default to deny for unsafe code - specific modules that require it can use #[allow(unsafe_code)]
 # The epoll reactor requires unsafe for the polling crate's FFI operations
